user.title: Add open data
user.description: Paste a portal, catalog, dataset page, resource/API URL, or dataset ID. Dataset links import only that dataset; portal roots start bounded catalog discovery.

data.portal_url: Portal URL for a bare ID (optional)

portal.title: Discover public datasets
portal.description: Enter an institution's public data portal URL. Open Data will prepare and cache the site structure. Large catalogs and file resources can take several minutes; you can leave this screen and return later.

dataset.title: Add a dataset directly
dataset.description: Paste a CKAN or Socrata dataset page, resource/API URL, or dataset ID. A portal URL is required when entering an ID by itself.

data.portal_url: Portal URL for a bare ID (optional)

discover.title: Choose discovered datasets
discover.description: Site preparation is complete. Found {count} ranked datasets on {portal} using {provider}. Selecting a large file may take another minute while its fields and update frequency are prepared and cached.

prepare.title: Prepare site catalog
prepare.description: Preparing the site catalog in the background. You may close this dialog and return later; no entities or regular downloads begin until you select and configure a dataset.

progress.prepare_catalog: Inspecting the portal, cataloguing datasets, and saving the catalog for later selection

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the supplied source.
error.invalid_reference: The source reference could not be recognized or resolved. Check the URL or provide the portal URL for a bare ID.
error.unsafe_source: The supplied source was blocked by Open Data's network safety checks.
error.invalid_dataset: The portal or selected dataset is invalid.
error.no_datasets: No suitable queryable datasets were discovered on this portal.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This open data resource is already configured.

init.title: Choose useful dataset fields
init.description: Dataset structure: {kind}. Automatic suggestions are preselected. Every category is optional and may be empty. Selecting a field in a later category moves it there; fields omitted from every category remain unassigned.

structure.title: Define units and records
structure.description: Combine selected fields into stable units and observations. Hierarchies are optional. Within each hierarchy set, select fields from largest/broadest to smallest/most specific; independent nested systems belong in separate sets. A record name may be used as its key.

records.title: Choose records and metrics
records.description: Record choices were rebuilt using {identity} as the identity for this {kind} dataset. Historical observation IDs should not be selected as locations.

error.invalid_field_roles: One or more field assignments were invalid. Review the selected fields and try again.
